title: peepopt: Add formal opt to rewrite latches to ffs in clock gates

features.name: clock_gating_latch_and_pattern
features.description: Code should include a level-sensitive latch with inverted clock enable feeding an AND gate that combines the latch output with the clock signal
features.snippet:
always @* if (!clk_i) latched_en = en;
assign gated_clk_o = latched_en & clk_i;

features.name: latch_to_flipflop_clock_gating_rewrite
features.description: Code should include both latch-style and flip-flop-style clock gating implementations showing the equivalence that enables the optimization rewrite

features.name: transparent_latch_false_combinational_path
features.description: Code should include a transparent latch that creates a false combinational path through an AND gate when the latch enable is active (clock high), causing false comb loops in formal verification
features.snippet:
always @* if (clk) q = d;
assign out = q & clk;
